sources.groups: Final draw held 2025-12-05; confirmed vs Wikipedia/FIFA
sources.fifa: FIFA/Coca-Cola Men's World Ranking via Sofascore, 2026-06-03 (ranks 51+ points approximate)
sources.odds: Yahoo Sports all-48-teams outright odds (American->decimal), early June 2026; cross-checked FOX/BetMGM

notes: FIFA points for the 11 teams ranked outside top 50 are approximate.
Third-place->R32 slot assignment in bracket.json approximates FIFA Annex C (495 combinations) via constraint-respecting matching.
